compiled_state.title: benchmark-sprint-workflow: header comment misrepresents second transition direction
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The header comment (lines 14-17) documents the transition ops as 'open -> in_progress' x 2, but the implementation does open->in_progress then in_progress->open to reset state between iterations. The comment is slightly misleading about what the second transition call does.
File: tests/scripts/benchmark-sprint-workflow.sh
Category: maintainability
